info.english_meaning: to humto moanto speak inarticulately to sound
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 6.136 ku ityatra 'dIrGAnta iti kEyawAdayaH' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'vyAkUtaya ezAmitATo cittAni muhyata' (aTarva0 324) vyAkUtayo virudDAH saNkalpAH
'duryoDanasya cAkUtaM tfzitasyeva vipruzaH' (BA0 karRa0 920) AkUtaM cezwitamiti nIlakaRWaH
'AkUtiH satyA manaso me astu' (f0 101284) AkUtiH saNkalpaH aBiprAyaH kAmaH
